---
name: pyhepmc
description: Use when the user needs to read or write HepMC3 event records in Python — generator-level event graphs, vertices, particle production chains — with the `pyhepmc` package. Does NOT cover Les Houches Event files (use `pylhe`), detector-level ROOT ntuples (use `physlite-basics`), or 4-vector math on the particles (use `vector`). Disambiguator phrase: pyhepmc HepMC3 event records.
data_scope: both
experiment: all
---
